author: SantiMod
content:
We've made a couple updates to the Star Atlas discord 



 We've added new Faction channels to discuss any faction specific plans or just be around people in your faction.

  Go react to an emoji in ⁠unknown and you'll receive access to a chat with others in your faction.



 We've added new Guild channels where you can look for a guild, advertise your own guild or just learn more about guilds in Star Atlas!

 You can learn more about the new Guild category and its' rules by reading ⁠unknown
